name: CENTCOM — Strait of Hormuz
subtitle: Iranian peer posture
description: Iranian / IRGC peer SIGINT posture in the Strait of Hormuz / Gulf of Oman littoral. Sources: RUSI 2023 IRGC EW assessments. Specific Iranian system identifications are limited; templated to peer-vehicular profile. Drops Iranian COMINT vehicle on the coastal road, generic peer DF inland, and a generic airborne pod orbit.

threats.note: Iranian COMINT vehicle on coastal road — direct LoS
Airborne SIGINT pod orbit — Saegheh-derived UAS
